speaker: QUEEN
text: Whiles yet the dew’s on ground, gather those flowers.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Make haste. Who has the note of them?

speaker: LADY
text: I, madam.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Dispatch.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Now, Master Doctor, have you brought those drugs?

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Pleaseth your Highness, ay. Here they are, madam.

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: But I beseech your Grace, without offense—

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: My conscience bids me ask—wherefore you have

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Commanded of me these most poisonous compounds,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Which are the movers of a languishing death,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: But though slow, deadly.

speaker: QUEEN
text: I wonder, doctor,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Thou ask’st me such a question. Have I not been

speaker: QUEEN
text: Thy pupil long? Hast thou not learned me how

speaker: QUEEN
text: To make perfumes, distil, preserve—yea, so

speaker: QUEEN
text: That our great king himself doth woo me oft

speaker: QUEEN
text: For my confections? Having thus far proceeded,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Unless thou think’st me devilish, is ’t not meet

speaker: QUEEN
text: That I did amplify my judgment in

speaker: QUEEN
text: Other conclusions? I will try the forces

speaker: QUEEN
text: Of these thy compounds on such creatures as

speaker: QUEEN
text: We count not worth the hanging—but none human—

speaker: QUEEN
text: To try the vigor of them and apply

speaker: QUEEN
text: Allayments to their act, and by them gather

speaker: QUEEN
text: Their several virtues and effects.

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Your Highness

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Shall from this practice but make hard your heart.

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Besides, the seeing these effects will be

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Both noisome and infectious.

speaker: QUEEN
text: O, content thee.

speaker: QUEEN
text:
Aside
                .
                 
              Here comes a flattering rascal. Upon him

speaker: QUEEN
text: Will I first work. He’s for his master

speaker: QUEEN
text: And enemy to my son.—How now, Pisanio?—

speaker: QUEEN
text: Doctor, your service for this time is ended.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Take your own way.

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: I do suspect you, madam,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: But you shall do no harm.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Hark thee, a word.

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: I do not like her. She doth think she has

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Strange ling’ring poisons. I do know her spirit,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: And will not trust one of her malice with

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: A drug of such damned nature. Those she has

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Will stupefy and dull the sense awhile,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Which first perchance she’ll prove on cats and dogs,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: Then afterward up higher. But there is

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: No danger in what show of death it makes,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: More than the locking-up the spirits a time,

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: To be more fresh, reviving. She is fooled

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: With a most false effect, and I the truer

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: So to be false with her.

speaker: QUEEN
text: No further service, doctor,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Until I send for thee.

speaker: CORNELIUS
text: I humbly take my leave.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Weeps she still, sayst thou? Dost thou think in time

speaker: QUEEN
text: She will not quench and let instructions enter

speaker: QUEEN
text: Where folly now possesses? Do thou work.

speaker: QUEEN
text: When thou shalt bring me word she loves my son,

speaker: QUEEN
text: I’ll tell thee on the instant thou art then

speaker: QUEEN
text: As great as is thy master; greater, for

speaker: QUEEN
text: His fortunes all lie speechless, and his name

speaker: QUEEN
text: Is at last gasp. Return he cannot, nor

speaker: QUEEN
text: Continue where he is. To shift his being

speaker: QUEEN
text: Is to exchange one misery with another,

speaker: QUEEN
text: And every day that comes comes to decay

speaker: QUEEN
text: A day’s work in him. What shalt thou expect,

speaker: QUEEN
text: To be depender on a thing that leans,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Who cannot be new built, nor has no friends

speaker: QUEEN
text: So much as but to prop him?

speaker: QUEEN
text: Thou tak’st up

speaker: QUEEN
text: Thou know’st not what. But take it for thy labor.

speaker: QUEEN
text: It is a thing I made which hath the King

speaker: QUEEN
text: Five times redeemed from death. I do not know

speaker: QUEEN
text: What is more cordial. Nay, I prithee, take it.

speaker: QUEEN
text: It is an earnest of a farther good

speaker: QUEEN
text: That I mean to thee. Tell thy mistress how

speaker: QUEEN
text: The case stands with her. Do ’t as from thyself.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Think what a chance thou changest on, but think

speaker: QUEEN
text: Thou hast thy mistress still; to boot, my son,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Who shall take notice of thee. I’ll move the King

speaker: QUEEN
text: To any shape of thy preferment such

speaker: QUEEN
text: As thou ’lt desire; and then myself, I chiefly,

speaker: QUEEN
text: That set thee on to this desert, am bound

speaker: QUEEN
text: To load thy merit richly. Call my women.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Think on my words.

speaker: QUEEN
text: A sly and constant knave,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Not to be shaked; the agent for his master

speaker: QUEEN
text: And the remembrancer of her to hold

speaker: QUEEN
text: The handfast to her lord. I have given him that

speaker: QUEEN
text: Which, if he take, shall quite unpeople her

speaker: QUEEN
text: Of liegers for her sweet, and which she after,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Except she bend her humor, shall be assured

speaker: QUEEN
text: To taste of too.

speaker: QUEEN
text: So, so. Well done, well done.

speaker: QUEEN
text: The violets, cowslips, and the primroses

speaker: QUEEN
text: Bear to my closet.—Fare thee well, Pisanio.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Think on my words.

speaker: PISANIO
text: And shall do.

speaker: PISANIO
text: But when to my good lord I prove untrue,

speaker: PISANIO
text: I’ll choke myself; there’s all I’ll do for you.
